typecheck.output: Success: no issues found in 50 source files

lint.command: cd /Users/stefano/repos/open-marcus/backend-python && source venv/bin/activate && ruff check src/

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document SSE event format convention: events should use `type` field (e.g., `{'type': 'token', 'content': '...'}`, `{'type': 'error', 'error': '...'}`). This was identified as a gap when llm-streaming-responses had an error event format bug in the original commit.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: llm-streaming-responses: original error events used `{'error': '...'}` without type field, causing silent error swallowing. Fixed in 1d812bc.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the logging import convention for new router/service files: include `import logging` and `logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)`. This pattern is used in settings.py, session.py, and models.py but not codified.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: llm-model-management failed originally (NameError: logger not defined) because worker didn't add logger import. Logging pattern is consistent across codebase but undocumented.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit step for adding logger import when creating new router/service files. Also add note about SSE event format conventions for streaming endpoints.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: llm-model-management: worker missed logger import. llm-streaming-responses: worker used inconsistent error event format. Both were convention gaps in skill.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Consider consolidating MARCUS_SYSTEM_PROMPT in one place. Currently defined in both LLMService (llm.py:53) and PersonaService (persona.py:46). AGENTS.md suggests 'config/prompts.yaml' for persona prompts but implementation uses hardcoded constants.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: llm-marcus-persona review found duplicate prompts in llm.py and persona.py. AGENTS.md line mentions config/prompts.yaml but not followed.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add health check for LLM model loading, or document that model loading is lazy (loaded on first use rather than at service startup). Currently backend-api has healthcheck but no equivalent for LLM model loading.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: llm-llama-cpp-integration review: model loaded lazily on first use, not at service startup. services.yaml has no startup/cleanup for model loading.

rejectedObservations.observation: llm-ram-detection review said architecture.md not in library/ - actually architecture.md exists at repo root .factory/library/architecture.md
rejectedObservations.reason: Library observation was based on checking wrong path
